# Third-Party Notices

## OrcaSlicer

Mycoforge Studio release installers may include OrcaSlicer as a separate
third-party executable tool. Mycoforge starts OrcaSlicer as an external process;
it does not link against OrcaSlicer source code.

- Package: OrcaSlicer
- Version: v2.3.2
- License: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 only
- Release: https://github.com/OrcaSlicer/OrcaSlicer/releases/tag/v2.3.2
- Corresponding source: https://github.com/OrcaSlicer/OrcaSlicer/tree/v2.3.2
- Source archive: https://github.com/OrcaSlicer/OrcaSlicer/archive/refs/tags/v2.3.2.zip

The AGPL-3.0 license text is included next to this notice as `AGPL-3.0.txt`.
